New APT campaign targeting financial sector with AI-generated phishing emails. Threat actor uses Claude API for spear-phishing. MITRE ATT&CK T1566.001 observed. IOC hashes and C2 infrastructure details inside.
Mar 30
Quick forensic analysis of memory dump revealed Cobalt Strike beacon. Volatility and velociraptor artifacts collected for timeline reconstruction.
